name: Calendar: List Events

description.en: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.
description.de: Listet kommende Ereignisse aus dem verbundenen Kalender in einem Datumsbereich auf.
description.es: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.
description.fr: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.
description.ro: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.
description.it: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.

bot: Use this when the user wants a full list of events. For casual introspection questions ('what's today?'), the CALENDAR provider context in the agent prompt already covers it — only use this warp for explicit list actions or wider ranges.

inputs.name: From
inputs.bot: Start of the range in ISO 8601. Defaults to today if omitted.

inputs.name: To
inputs.bot: End of the range in ISO 8601. Defaults to 14 days from today if omitted.

inputs.name: Title filter

description.en: Optional title keyword to filter events by
description.de: Optionaler Titelbegriff zum Filtern von Ereignissen
description.es: Optional title keyword to filter events by
description.fr: Optional title keyword to filter events by
description.ro: Optional title keyword to filter events by
description.it: Optional title keyword to filter events by

inputs.bot: Only returns events whose title contains this text (case-sensitive). Useful for finding specific recurring meetings.
